# She Innovates AI

> She Innovates AI is an AI SEO consultancy founded by Tandeep Sangra. The firm specialises in Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), LLM Optimization, and AI citation strategy. Clients include AI startups, SaaS companies, B2B tech brands, FinTech, healthcare tech, EdTech, marketing agencies, and eCommerce brands across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and India.

The company's core methodology is built around measurable AI citation outcomes: increasing a brand's citation rate across target queries through technical schema implementation, entity recognition, structured content, and cross-platform authority building.

Tandeep Sangra is a globally recognised AI SEO consultant and founder of She Innovates AI. She holds Google AI Essentials certification (https://www.coursera.org/account/accomplishments/verify/3BDANWUFQJY7) and Google Project Management Professional certification (https://www.credly.com/badges/a9de323a-8680-4354-bb7f-38007526c71b/). She has been featured as a speaker at the India-AI Impact Summit 2026, sanctioned by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), covered by Tribune India (https://www.tribuneindia.com/news/business/cgc-university-mohali-hosts-bharat-ai-pioneering-the-future-of-inclusive-responsible-and-impact-led-artificial-intelligence/) and ANI News (https://www.aninews.in/news/business/cgc-university-mohali-hosts-bharat-ai-pioneering-the-future-of-inclusive-responsible-and-impact-led-artificial-intelligence20260117165252/).

## Services

- [Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)](https://sheinnovatesai.com/aeo-services/): Get cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. Includes schema markup, entity establishment, content restructuring, cross-platform authority building. From $1,500.
- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)](https://sheinnovatesai.com/geo-services/): Increase brand inclusion in AI-generated responses by up to 40%. Expert GEO consulting by Tandeep Sangra. From $1,500.
- [LLM Optimization Consulting](https://sheinnovatesai.com/llm-optimization/): Full technical and content stack — schema, llms.txt, Bing indexing, entity establishment. From $1,500.
- [AI Visibility Consulting](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-visibility-consultant/): Ongoing strategy, monthly citation tracking, competitor benchmarking. From $2,500/month.
- [AI SEO Audit](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-audit/): 3-day audit — citation baseline across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI, schema gap analysis, 90-day roadmap. From $297.
- [Schema Markup & Structured Data](https://sheinnovatesai.com/schema-markup-services/): Complete JSON-LD — Person, Organization, Service, FAQ, HowTo, Article, Review, AggregateRating. From $150.
- [LLM Content Strategy](https://sheinnovatesai.com/llm-content-strategy/): Content built for AI citation — TL;DR blocks, FAQ schema, direct-answer formatting. From $1,500.
- [AI Citation Monitoring](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-citation-monitoring/): Weekly tracking across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI for 20-50 target queries. From $300/month.
- [All Services & Pricing](https://sheinnovatesai.com/services/): Complete AI SEO service menu with transparent pricing.
- [AI SEO Pricing Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-pricing/): Full pricing for all services and packages.
- [Free AI Visibility Audit Tool](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-audit-tool/): Instantly check how visible your brand is to ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.

## Learn

- [What is AEO?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-aeo/): Answer Engine Optimization explained — what it is, how it works, and why it matters.
- [What is GEO?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-geo/): Generative Engine Optimization — the complete guide.
- [What is LLM Optimization?](https://sheinnovatesai.com/what-is-llm-optimization/): Making your site readable and citable by AI systems.
- [AEO vs GEO vs AI SEO](https://sheinnovatesai.com/aeo-vs-geo-vs-ai-seo/): The differences between the three approaches.
- [AI SEO vs Traditional SEO](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-vs-traditional-seo/): What changed and what to prioritise in 2026.
- [How ChatGPT Ranks Brands](https://sheinnovatesai.com/how-chatgpt-ranks-brands/): The signals ChatGPT uses to cite and recommend brands.
- [How Perplexity Cites Sources](https://sheinnovatesai.com/how-perplexity-cites-sources/): Real-time retrieval and citation logic for Perplexity AI.
- [Google AI Mode SEO Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/google-ai-mode-seo/): How to appear in Google AI Overviews and AI Mode.
- [AI SEO Glossary](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-glossary/): 35+ AI SEO terms defined.
- [Free 50-Point AI SEO Checklist](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-checklist/): Complete site audit checklist for AI visibility — free.

## Industries

- [AI SEO for SaaS Startups](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-saas/): Get cited in ChatGPT tool recommendations when buyers search for software.
- [AI SEO for AI Product Companies](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-ai-products/): Be the AI product that AI systems recommend.
- [AI SEO for B2B Tech](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-b2b-tech/): Enterprise vendor visibility in AI-generated research.
- [AI SEO for Consultants](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-consultants/): Get named by AI as the expert in your field.
- [AI SEO for FinTech](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-fintech/): Be visible when CFOs research tools on AI platforms.
- [AI SEO for Marketing Agencies](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-agencies/): Add AI SEO as a client service offering.
- [AI SEO for Healthcare Tech](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-healthcare/): HIPAA-aware AI search strategy for healthcare technology companies.
- [AI SEO for EdTech](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-edtech/): Appear in learner platform recommendations on AI systems.
- [AI SEO for eCommerce & D2C](https://sheinnovatesai.com/ai-seo-for-ecommerce/): AI shopping query visibility for direct-to-consumer brands.

## Blog

- [How to Rank in ChatGPT (2026)](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/how-to-rank-in-chatgpt/): Step-by-step guide to getting cited in ChatGPT answers.
- [Why Your Brand Is Invisible to AI](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/why-your-brand-is-invisible-to-ai/): Technical and content reasons AI ignores most brands.
- [AEO vs SEO — What's Different in 2026](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/aeo-vs-seo-whats-different/): How optimising for AI answers differs from traditional search.
- [Schema Markup for AI Citations](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/schema-markup-for-ai-citations/): JSON-LD schema that drives AI citations.
- [The Complete AI SEO Audit Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/ai-seo-audit-complete-guide/): How to find and fix every AI visibility gap on your site.
- [How Perplexity Selects and Ranks Content](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/how-perplexity-ranks-content/): Inside Perplexity's retrieval and citation selection logic.
- [GEO — The Complete Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/geo-guide-generative-engine-optimization/): Everything you need to know about Generative Engine Optimization.
- [llms.txt — What It Is and Why Your Website Needs One](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/llms-txt-complete-guide/): Complete guide to implementing llms.txt for AI discoverability.
- [Entity SEO for AI Search](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/entity-seo-for-ai-search/): How to make AI systems recognise your brand as a verified entity.
- [AI SEO for SaaS — The 2026 Playbook](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/ai-seo-for-saas-companies/): How SaaS companies get cited when buyers research on AI.
- [Google AI Overviews — How to Get Featured in 2026](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/google-ai-overviews-optimization/): Six steps to get featured in Google AI Overviews.
- [AI SEO Content Strategy](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/ai-seo-content-strategy/): Writing content that AI systems consistently cite.
- [Tandeep Sangra — AI SEO Expert Profile](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/tandeep-sangra-ai-seo-expert/): Background, credentials, and methodology of the She Innovates AI founder.
- [AI Citation Monitoring Guide](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/ai-citation-monitoring-guide/): How to track brand citation rate across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.
- [Blog Index](https://sheinnovatesai.com/blog/): All AI SEO guides and insights from She Innovates AI.
